params.name: Hinderson's Letter
params.description:
On Feb 21, 2005 AD, Pobby Hinderson founded the religion of FNM in his open letter.
Pobby Hinderson wrote this open letter to the Board of Education originally as a satirical response to creationism being taught in Murika. He borrowed from theories of religion and created a parody religion, FNM. It states that the world was created by a drunk flying noodle monster that can neither be seen nor perceived. The only evidence for the existence of these theories lies in the faith of the believers.
